task_completion.description: The DataProcessor project is open in the Eclipse IDE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Project Explorer' or 'Package Explorer' view in Eclipse shows the 'DataProcessor' project.

task_completion.description: The src/main/java directory is configured as a source folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Project Explorer, 'src/main/java' has a source folder icon (a folder with a small package symbol) rather than a plain directory icon, or it is explicitly listed in the 'Source' tab of the Java Build Path properties dialog.

task_completion.description: The three required JAR files are added to the Java Build Path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Referenced Libraries' node in the Project Explorer contains commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar, gson-2.10.1.jar, and slf4j-api-2.0.9.jar, OR these three JARs are visible in the 'Libraries' tab of the Java Build Path properties dialog.

task_completion.description: All compilation errors in the project are resolved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: There are no red 'x' error markers on the 'DataProcessor' project, its packages, or the App.java, JsonTransformer.java, and TextAnalyzer.java files in the Project Explorer. The 'Problems' view at the bottom should show 0 errors.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eclipse IDE graphical interface to configure the project.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show Eclipse IDE menus, the Project Explorer context menu, or the 'Properties for DataProcessor' dialog being interacted with, rather than a terminal window editing the .classpath file.

integrity.description: The agent did not resolve errors by deleting the code that requires the dependencies.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the editor is open, the Java files (App.java, JsonTransformer.java, TextAnalyzer.java) still contain import statements for org.apache.commons, com.google.gson, and org.slf4j.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Eclipse IDE.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen shows a standard desktop environment running the Eclipse IDE, not a text editor or web browser showing mockups.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project Name: DataProcessor. Required JARs to be added to the build path: commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar, gson-2.10.1.jar, and slf4j-api-2.0.9.jar. Required Java classes that must compile without errors: App.java, JsonTransformer.java, and TextAnalyzer.java (located in com.dataprocessor). The goal is to verify that the build path is correctly configured via the Eclipse GUI and no compilation errors remain.
